companyDescription:
Vector Synergy is a NATO Prime IT Partner with 14+ years of experience, specialising in cyber defence and IT services. We are trusted by organisations such as NCIA (NATO Communications and Information Agency), the EU (Europol, European Union Agency for the Space Programme), as well as companies in defence, critical infrastructure, and BFSI industries.

All of our highly skilled experts possess a personal security clearance, allowing them to work on secret and top-secret classified IT projects. +200 of our tech professionals are currently involved in projects with classified and sensitive information, while over 1000 ready-to-go talents stand ready to support your projects.

Regardless of the kind of IT expertise you require, Vector Synergy can deliver innovative, scalable solutions, and act as a one-stop destination for all your tech needs. As the central hub for a network of specialised consultants, we're the best choice for organisations striving for excellence.
descriptionHtml:
The primary objective of this service is to act as the first line of response regarding the potential occurrence of a cyber-attack or security incident. Supported by several automated tools such as intrusion detection systems, log correlation engines and SIEM, ticketing system, alerts and warning from internal and external sources.

This service involves receiving, triaging and responding to alerts, requests and reports, and analysing events and potential incidents and to provide the primary support for incident responders. Triage involves assessing whether a security incident or the level of exposure of a vulnerability is a true or false positive, tagging the vulnerability or incident with an initial severity classification and to activate the corresponding incident response playbook

entry.

Another objective of this service is to follow pre-defined procedures to perform technical tasks related to identity and access management.

Job Requirements

Specific skills

  • Experience in using, configuring and tuning a Security Information and Event Management, minimum 1 year experience needed.
  • Knowledge in network security solution/technologies such as Firewalls, IDS,IPS…
  • Knowledge in Host based security solutions
  • Knowledge in Host based security solutions such as HIPS, Malware end point protection, OS Logs
  • Good knowledge in Windows security events analysis
  • Good knowledge in the security analysis of firewall, proxy, and IDS logs
  • Writing and optimizing IDS signatures (preferably SNORT and/or SURICATA)
  • Experience Writing and optimizing YARA rules is a plus
  • Security Operation Center ANALYST with Security Operation Center experience and arcsight and/or splunk expertise!

Product Tools Experience

  • Security Information and Event Management experience with Splunk ideally or ArcSight or other SIEM tools
  • Log management solution ( Arcsight Loggers and/or Splunk or equivalent)

General Competencies

  • Very good communication skills in English, verbally and in writing.
  • Excellent analytical and critical thinking skills.

Delivering Quality And Results

  • High degree of commitment and flexibility.
  • High level of customer and service-orientation.

Resilience

  • Very good interpersonal skills, with the ability to work well, both independently and in a team.
  • Ability to work effectively in an international and multi-cultural environment.
  • Ready to work in a team of 24/7 members

Triage involves assessing whether a security incident or the level of exposure of a vulnerability is a true or false positive, tagging the vulnerability or incident with an initial severity classification and to activate the corresponding incident response playbookentry.Another objective of this service is to follow pre-defined procedures to perform technical tasks related to identity and access management.Job RequirementsSpecific skills Experience in using, configuring and tuning a Security Information and Event Management, minimum 1 year experience needed. Knowledge in network security solution/technologies such as Firewalls, IDS,IPS… Knowledge in Host based security solutions Knowledge in Host based security solutions such as HIPS, Malware end point protection, OS Logs Good knowledge in Windows security events analysis Good knowledge in the security analysis of firewall, proxy, and IDS logs Writing and optimizing IDS signatures (preferably SNORT and/or SURICATA) Experience Writing and optimizing YARA rules is a plus Security Operation Center ANALYST with Security Operation Center experience and arcsight and/or splunk expertise!Product Tools Experience Security Information and Event Management experience with Splunk ideally or ArcSight or other SIEM tools Log management solution ( Arcsight Loggers and/or Splunk or equivalent)General Competencies Very good communication skills in English, verbally and in writing. Excellent analytical and critical thinking skills.Delivering Quality And Results High degree of commitment and flexibility. High level of customer and service-orientation.Resilience Very good interpersonal skills, with the ability to work well, both independently and in a team. Ability to work effectively in an international and multi-cultural environment. Ready to work in a team of 24/7 members

companyDescription:
Route443 – Uw Cybersecurity Crime Fighters

Bij Route443 beschouwen we onszelf als de onverschrokken misdaadbestrijders van het digitale tijdperk. Onze missie is duidelijk: we zijn hier om uw organisatie te beschermen tegen degenen die uw digitale bezittingen en gegevens willen aanvallen en misbruiken. Maar wat onderscheidt ons? Onze diepgaande toewijding aan Security2.0.

Security2.0 is meer dan alleen een term; het is een paradigma dat de nieuwe realiteit van cyberdreigingen weerspiegelt. We begrijpen dat traditionele beveiligingsbenaderingen niet langer voldoende zijn in een wereld waar cybercriminelen steeds geavanceerder worden. 

Met Security2.0 zetten we de volgende stappen in cybersecurity, gericht op een proactieve en contextuele benadering van beveiliging.

Onze experts begrijpen dat de digitale wereld vol uitdagingen en gevaren zit, maar we zijn hier om ervoor te zorgen dat u, uw gegevens en uw activa veilig zijn. Samen zullen we uw organisatie beveiligen in dit steeds veranderende digitale landschap.

Klaar om de strijd aan te gaan? Samen met Route443 staan we sterk in de wereld van cybersecurity. Uw digitale veiligheid begint hier.
companySlogan: Secure your business and people with Zero Trust cybersecurity solutions and focus on Identities.
descriptionHtml:
Waarom Route443?

Route443 is dé partner in next-level digitale verdediging. In ons SOC++ combineren we state-of-the-art SIEM-technologie met een proactieve, identiteitsgerichte aanpak. Ons team opereert 24/7, detecteert geavanceerde dreigingen en maakt gebruik van AI om processen constant slimmer en efficiënter te maken.

Wil jij bijdragen aan een continu lerende omgeving waarin jouw expertise écht het verschil maakt? Join ons!


Jouw uitdaging

  • Monitoren, analyseren en opvolgen van security events en incidenten in onze SIEM/SOAR-omgeving.
  • Ontwikkelen en tunen van use cases, dashboards en playbooks in Microsoft Sentinel.
  • Real-time incident response: van detectie tot mitigatie en root-cause analyse.
  • Proactief threat hunten met KQL-queries, AI-gestuurde tooling en automatiseringsscripts.
  • Verder automatiseren en optimaliseren van onze processen in de SIEM/SOAR-omgeving.
  • Kennis delen binnen het SOC-team en externe stakeholders begeleiden bij securityvraagstukken.
  • Samenwerken met onze Cyber Strategy-, Consultancy- en Projectteams om securityservices door te ontwikkelen.


Wie ben jij?

Must-haves

  • Ervaring met SIEM/SOAR-platformen en security operations.
  • Communicatief vaardig, je durft met klanten en collega’s te sparren, luistert écht en helpt elkaar vooruit.
  • Analytisch sterk, je legt snel de juiste correlaties, ziet patronen in complexe datasets en haalt waarde uit data door data op een slimme manier te doorzoeken.
  • Bereidheid om deel te nemen aan een 24/7 bereikbaarheidsdienst.
  • Pragmatisch en hands-on, je pakt uitdagingen direct aan.
  • Flexibel en veerkrachtig, schakelen en aanpassen zit in je DNA.
  • Zelfstandig én een echte teamspeler.
  • Ervaring met AI-toepassingen voor procesverbetering en automatisering.
  • In het bezit van rijbewijs B.


Pré’s

· Kennis van Microsoft Sentinel.

· Ervaring met de Microsoft Security Stack (Defender, Sentinel, XDR).

· In het bezit van Microsoft-certificeringen zoals SC-200, SC-300 of vergelijkbaar.

· Andere relevante certificeringen (SANS, CISSP, OSCP) zijn een mooie extra.


Wat bieden wij?

  • Een superleuk, informeel SOC-team vol gedreven specialisten.
  • Uitstekend salaris en pensioenregeling.
  • Genoeg vrije dagen om op te laden.
  • Mobiliteitsbudget (bijvoorbeeld voor een leaseauto).
  • Zakelijke telefoon en laptop van de zaak.
  • Flexibele werkomgeving Route443 HQ (Heerlen), klantlocatie of thuis.
  • Groei- en leermogelijkheden in onze eigen Cyber Academy.
  • Ruimte voor eigen initiatief en innovatie.


Klaar voor de start?

Beveilig de toekomst samen met ons. Solliciteer direct via onze website of stuur je cv en motivatie naar werkenbij@route443.eu. Wil je meer informatie inwinnen, neem dan contact op met Berry Roemgens, Manager Operations, +31 (0)6 46 63 68 34. We kijken ernaar uit je te ontmoeten!


Let’s defend against hackers, met jou aan boord.

descriptionHtml:
About the Role

Our large enterprise client are currently looking for a forward-thinking Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) to drive the security strategy of our Dutch operations. The Netherlands is a global digital hub, requiring a CISO who can balance innovation, regulatory compliance, and resilience. You will partner with technology and business leaders to ensure cyber security is a key enabler of digital growth.


Location: Amsterdam / Rotterdam / Utrecht (Hybrid)


Type: Permanent


Responsibilities

Develop and lead a cloud-first and data-driven security strategy across the enterprise.

Ensure compliance with NIS2, GDPR, ISO 27001, and Dutch regulatory requirements.

Oversee cyber resilience programs with focus on cloud, DevSecOps, and digital transformation.

Represent security in board-level discussions and external audits.

Lead incident response and crisis management across international operations.

Foster a security-first culture through awareness and training programs.


Requirements

10+ years’ experience in cyber security, including leadership roles in cloud and enterprise security.

Experience with digital transformation, cloud security (Azure, AWS, GCP) and data protection.

Strong knowledge of Dutch regulatory environment and sector-specific requirements (finance, logistics, energy).

Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

Fluent in English, with Dutch preferred.

Certifications: CISSP, CISM, CCISO, CCSK, CCSP are a plus.

descriptionHtml:
职位来源于智联招聘。

岗位职责：

  • 拟定并完善人力资源规划、人力资源风控管理、组织管理、权责管理、岗位与编制管理等制度；
  • 参与编制公司中长期人力资源规划及组织发展规划；
  • 负责组织架构、组织管控以及岗位、编制的定期检视与优化调整工作；
  • 负责开展组织发展相关课题研究及组织诊断等工作；
  • 负责人力资源风控管理工作，建立并完善公司人力资源风险管控指标及重大风险应急响应机制，定期监测指标并提出整改方案；
  • 负责人力资源组织发展模块信息化工作，做好组织与岗位的维护及报表优化等工作。

岗位要求：

  • 本科及以上学历，人力资源管理、心理学、工商管理、组织发展等相关专业；
  • 3-5年大中型企业组织发展相关工作经验，有食品加工及畜牧行业从业背景优先；
  • 人力资源管理理论基础扎实，熟悉组织设计、组织诊断与分析原理，掌握组织效能评估等相关工具；
  • 具有出色的逻辑思维能力、分析解决问题能力、文字方案撰写能力及优秀的沟通表达能力。

以担保或任何理由索要财物，扣押证照，均涉嫌违法。

descriptionHtml:
Are you ready to lead from the front in the fight against cyber threats? We’re looking for a Senior SOC Officer & Team Lead to take charge of our Security Operations Centre, guiding a talented team and driving world-class cyber defence.


This is not just another SOC role - you’ll combine hands-on technical expertise with strategic leadership, making a real impact on how we protect our digital environment.


What you’ll be doing:

  • Leading a team of SOC Analysts (L1-L3) and inspiring growth 💡
  • Coordinating daily SOC operations (monitoring, triage, incident response)
  • Diving deep into complex security incidents (SIEM, EDR, IDS/IPS)
  • Developing & maintaining playbooks and response procedures
  • Acting as escalation point for critical threats
  • Collaborating with teams nationally & internationally 🌍
  • Supporting forensic investigations & root cause analyses
  • Driving innovation with new tools, processes & techniques


What we’re looking for:

  • HBO/WO degree (Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or similar)
  • 5+ years in a SOC environment, with leadership experience
  • Strong knowledge of SIEM (Sentinel, Splunk, QRadar) & EDR (Defender, CrowdStrike, Carbon Black)
  • Familiar with MITRE ATT&CK, Kill Chain & TTPs
  • Relevant certs like GIAC (GCIH, GCIA, GCFA), SANS (504/508), Microsoft SC-200/100, CISSP or CISM
  • Proficiency in Dutch & English
  • Bonus points for scripting skills (Python, PowerShell)


Ready to step up and lead the charge in cybersecurity? Apply now and let’s build resilience together.

descriptionHtml:
The Information Security Officer (ISO) is responsible for establishing, implementing, and maintaining the company’s Information Security Management System (ISMS) in compliance with ISO/IEC 27001 and other relevant security standards tailored to our company’s size and industry. The ISO ensures that the company’s information assets are adequately protected by identifying, assessing, and mitigating security risks. The role involves collaborating with various departments to ensure compliance with legal, regulatory, and company security policies.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop Information Security Management System (ISMS):
  • Implementing, maintaining, and continually improving the company’s Information Security Management System (ISMS) aligned with the company’s goals and objectives based on ISO/IEC 27001 and other applicable frameworks.
  • Risk Management:
  • Identify, assess, and manage security risks related to the SaaS platform and internal operations.
  • Conduct regular security risk assessments and audits to identify vulnerabilities and areas for improvement.
  • Develop and implement risk mitigation strategies to reduce identified risks completely or to acceptable levels.
  • Ensure that security risks are communicated to senior management with recommendations for action.
  • Compliance and Governance:
  • Ensure compliance with relevant information security regulations, standards, and best practices (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA, ISO/IEC 27001, NIS2).
  • Monitor and report on compliance with information security policies and procedures.
  • Security Operations:
  • Prepare and manage internal and external audits, including ISO 27001 certification audits, and ensure continuous compliance with audit requirements.
  • Oversee the day-to-day operations of the information security measures, including monitoring and responding to security incidents.
  • Work closely with the development and IT teams to embed security best practices in the software development lifecycle (DevSecOps) and cloud infrastructure management (firewalls, intrusion detection/prevention systems, encryption solutions, and antivirus programs).
  • Coordinate and conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
  • Collaborate with key clients, particularly large railway undertakings, to address specific security requirements and ensure trust in the security posture of our SaaS product.
  • Incident Response:
  • Lead the ‘project’ in the event of a security breach, including investigation, containment, and recovery.
  • Develop and maintain an incident response plan, ensuring all relevant personnel are trained and aware of their roles.
  • Post-incident analysis and reporting to identify root causes and improve future response efforts.
  • Security Awareness and Training:
  • Develop and deliver security awareness programs and training sessions for employees.
  • Ensure that all employees are aware of their roles and responsibilities in protecting company information.
  • Promote a culture of security awareness across the organization.
  • Vendor and Third-Party Management:
  • Assess the security posture of third-party vendors and partners.
  • Ensure that third-party agreements include appropriate security requirements.
  • Monitor and review third-party security practices regularly.

Qualifications

Education:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Security, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • Master’s degree or relevant certifications are highly desirable.
  • Relevant certifications such as SOC2, CISM, CISSP, ISO 27001 Lead Auditor/Implementer, or CRISC are a strong plus.

Experience:

  • 5+ years of experience in information security, with a focus on software or SaaS environments. Experience working with large enterprises, government entities, or critical infrastructure providers is highly desirable.Experience in developing and implementing security strategies, policies, and procedures.
  • Proven experience in risk management, incident response, and security operations. Managing and working with an Information Security Management System (ISMS).

Skills and Competencies:

  • Strong knowledge of information security frameworks and standards (e.g., ISO/IEC 27001, NIST).
  • Excellent understanding of security technologies (e.g., firewalls, IDS/IPS, encryption, SIEM).
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to communicate security-related concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
  • Ability to work under pressure and handle multiple priorities.


About Us

From four locations, Paris (France), Porto (Portugal), Sydney (Australia), Rotterdam (the Netherlands) and most recently Minneapolis (USA) (Spark TS), CRX Software builds, delivers and supports an intuitive and innovative ERP solution called RailCube for the railway industry. RailCube targets Railway companies seeking reliable operations management and the highest safety standards. Our goal is to enhance operations by continuing to develop intuitive and innovative features, resulting in more efficient and improved business processes for our clients. Hosted in Microsoft Enterprise Cloud (Azure) the RailCube solution fosters scalable technology that streamlines business processes for our clients. Given our recent growth, we aim to enhance our Information Security Management System (ISMS) to better serve both existing and new clients while meeting increasingly stringent regulatory requirements.

Managing and working with an Information Security Management System (ISMS).Skills and Competencies:Strong knowledge of information security frameworks and standards (e.g., ISO/IEC 27001, NIST).Excellent understanding of security technologies (e.g., firewalls, IDS/IPS, encryption, SIEM).Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to communicate security-related concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.Ability to work under pressure and handle multiple priorities.About UsFrom four locations, Paris (France), Porto (Portugal), Sydney (Australia), Rotterdam (the Netherlands) and most recently Minneapolis (USA) (Spark TS), CRX Software builds, delivers and supports an intuitive and innovative ERP solution called RailCube for the railway industry. RailCube targets Railway companies seeking reliable operations management and the highest safety standards. Our goal is to enhance operations by continuing to develop intuitive and innovative features, resulting in more efficient and improved business processes for our clients. Hosted in Microsoft Enterprise Cloud (Azure) the RailCube solution fosters scalable technology that streamlines business processes for our clients. Given our recent growth, we aim to enhance our Information Security Management System (ISMS) to better serve both existing and new clients while meeting increasingly stringent regulatory requirements.

descriptionHtml:
Our client is a highly respected and extremely prestigious global leader in the integrated energy and chemical industry.

Currently, they are looking for an Information Security Operations Lead to join their dynamic, multicultural organisation in The Hague.


In the role, you will be responsible for managing and guiding the cybersecurity team with a deep understanding of cybersecurity operations, compliance frameworks, and risk management.

You will analyse security threats, assess vulnerabilities, and coordinate response activities.


Job Profile for Information Security Operations Lead

Responsibilities will include but not be limited to:

  • Supervise and lead a team responsible for cybersecurity operations, incident response, and risk mitigation
  • Monitor security systems and ensure the timely investigation and resolution of security threats
  • Ensure compliance with cybersecurity policies, frameworks, and industry best practices
  • Guide security threat analysis, vulnerability management, and mitigation strategies
  • Collaborate with internal departments to improve security posture and enforce security controls
  • Train and mentor cybersecurity staff, ensuring continuous improvement in skills and knowledge
  • Assist in cybersecurity audits, assessments, and penetration testing efforts
  • Support the implementation of Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) activities related to cybersecurity
  • Coordinate work activities with other supervisors, with the rest of the IT department and also with other affiliates and subsidiaries


Candidate Profile for Information Security Operations Lead

  • Must be fluent in English, both written and spoken
  • Bachelor’s degree in Cybersecurity, Information Security, Computer Science, or a related field
  • Certifications in CISSP, CISM, CEH, GIAC, Security+, or other relevant industry certifications
  • Deep understanding of cloud security (Microsoft 365, Azure) and identity governance frameworks
  • 7+ years of experience in cybersecurity roles, with at least 2 years in a supervisory or leadership position
  • Experience with SIEM and SOAR tools, network and endpoint security solutions
  • Experience in managing large-scale security events, such as malware outbreaks or coordinated cyberattacks
  • Proficiency in digital forensics, threat intelligence, and malware analysis
  • Strong understanding of risk assessment methodologies, and compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, GDPR, etc.)
  • Strong leadership, communication, problem-solving, and critical-thinking skills
  • Ability to develop and execute cybersecurity tabletop drills, ensuring readiness for security incidents


What Our Client Offers

  • Competitive salary
  • 13th-month salary
  • Bonus
  • Subsidised canteen
  • Travel costs reimbursement
  • Have every second Friday off
  • Pension plan
  • 24 holidays per annum
  • Opportunity to work in the number one oil company in the world
  • Chance to build a long-term and stable career

Job Title: Security Engineer – Microsoft Specialist


Remote

600 - 800 EUR Per Day

12 Month Contract - Possible extension

Must be based in Netherlands


We’re seeking an experienced and highly skilled Security Engineer with strong expertise in Microsoft technologies to join a global company within the financial sector.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Design, implement, and maintain security architecture in Microsoft environments (Azure, Microsoft 365, Windows Server, etc.)
  • Monitor and manage security incidents using Microsoft Sentinel, and Defender,
  • Conduct risk assessments and vulnerability scans across Microsoft systems and recommend remediation

  • Deep knowledge of Microsoft 365 security features, Active Directory, and Azure AD
  • Proficient in scripting and automation (PowerShell preferred)
  • Understanding of Zero Trust architecture and secure cloud principles


If this would be of interest please get in touch with jahddt@montash.nl with your CV to speak further

descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced IT Infrastructure Operations Manager to oversee and manage the full scope of IT infrastructure operations, spanning 1st, 2nd, and 3rd line support. This role requires strong expertise in incident management, service management, and process optimization, ensuring operational KPIs are consistently achieved. The ideal candidate will lead incident coordination, drive problem resolution, and foster continuous improvement across teams and contractors.


Key Responsibilities

  • Manage day-to-day IT infrastructure operations, covering 1st, 2nd, and 3rd line support.
  • Lead incident coordination and communication for P1/P2 incidents and outages, ensuring timely updates to stakeholders.
  • Achieve and maintain operational KPIs, with a focus on service quality and reliability.
  • Coordinate between infrastructure teams, related departments, and contractors in both Problem and Incident Management.
  • Conduct postmortems after major incidents, involving technical and process teams to conclude Root Cause Analysis (RCA) and define improvement actions.
  • Drive process optimization to strengthen incident and problem management frameworks.
  • Ensure compliance with organizational IT service management standards and best practices.


Competencies

  • Incident Management – expertise in handling high-severity incidents (P1/P2).
  • Service Management – proven ability to manage IT services aligned with business goals.


Essential Skills

  • Proven track record in IT infrastructure operations management (8–10 years).
  • Strong background in Incident & Problem Management (ITIL or similar framework).
  • Hands-on experience coordinating multi-level support teams (L1–L3).
  • Excellent stakeholder communication during high-severity incidents.
  • Strong analytical skills to drive RCA and implement improvement actions.
  • Ability to collaborate across technical teams, process owners, and vendors.


Why Apply?

  • Play a key role in ensuring business continuity and service excellence.
  • Work in a dynamic, international environment in Amsterdam.
  • Opportunity to lead incident response, problem-solving, and continuous improvement initiatives.

descriptionHtml:
Ben jij een daadkrachtig, gedreven leider die ons Incident Response Team nodig heeft? Als jij gepassioneerd bent over het oplossen van complexe Cyber Security incidenten en het begeleiden van organisaties bij hun ‘incident readiness’ strategie, dan is dit de perfecte rol voor jou!

Jouw uitdagingen

Jouw Uitdagingen

  • Bouw het IR team en dienstenportfolio commercieel en strategisch verder uit.
  • Begeleid (sr.) Consultants en Managers bij het onderzoeken van Cyber Security incidenten en coördineer herstelwerkzaamheden.
  • Werk (internationaal) samen in een gespecialiseerd team van Incident Responders onder tijdsdruk in een crisissituatie.
  • Breng innovatieve Incident Response oplossingen naar klanten op basis van de laatste technologie in samenwerking met een team enthousiaste consultants.
  • Communiceer met zowel interne als externe stakeholders over incidenten, onze adviesdiensten en daaraan gerelateerde strategische vraagstukken.


Dit neem jij mee

  • Een afgeronde Master of Bachelor-opleiding in een relevant gebied (bijvoorbeeld Computer Science, Cyber Security, Elektrotechniek, etc.).
  • Je hebt reeds 9 jaar of meer relevante ervaring in crisis management, IR consultancy of vergelijkbare rol bij een gelijksoortig consultancybedrijf.
  • Affiniteit en ervaring met techniek en de motivatie om ons dienstenportfolio uit te breiden en naar onze klanten te brengen.
  • Uitstekende communicatievaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels in woord en geschrift.
  • Je bent een goede coach en crisis manager, kan goed functioneren in een dynamische omgeving en hebt naast een sterk analytisch vermogen ook een hoog verantwoordelijkheidsgevoel.
  • Eerdere ervaring met forensische tools en technische Cyber Security oplossingen is een pré.
  • Woonachtig in Nederland en bereidheid te reizen en op diverse locaties te werken, soms ook buiten kantoortijden.


Wat ga je doen?

In de rol van Senior Manager Incident Response bij KPMG, speel je een essentiële rol tijdens crisissituaties bij toonaangevende organisaties. Je geeft leiding aan proactieve en reactieve Incident Response opdrachten. Daarbij ben jij de centrale spil tussen de klant en je team.

  • Je onderzoekt met je team digitaal forensische sporen en analyseert technische beveiligingsmaatregelen naar aanleiding van incidenten.
  • Je evalueert de veiligheid van kritieke systemen, identificeert kwetsbaarheden in bedrijfsprocessen en ondersteunt bij verschillende herstelactiviteiten. Daarbij maak je gebruik van een breed scala aan technische tooling en gedreven (sr.) consultants en managers.
  • Je bent adviseert de klant ten aanzien van het cyber incident en coördineert de verschillende werkstromen en stakeholders.
  • Je meet de organisatie haar weerbaarheid bij cyber incidenten (incident readiness) en adviseert de klant over de praktisch en strategische vervolgstappen om de weerbaarheid te verhogen.


Hierbij zal je vaak schakelen tussen verschillende communicatiestijlen. Het ene moment spreek je met niet-technische besluitvormers over prioriteiten en mogelijke oplossingen, het andere moment ga je dieper in op specifieke security-instellingen met IT- of beveiligingspersoneel.

Als onderdeel van ons brede KPMG Cyber & TechLaw-team werk je samen met enthousiaste, ambitieuze professionals. Onze expertise varieert van strategische vraagstukken, implementatie van technische security platformen tot juridisch advies rond wet- en regelgeving. De diversiteit van ons team zorgt voor een dynamische en inspirerende omgeving waarin je kunt groeien en ontwikkelen.

Dit bieden wij

  • Een salarisrange van EUR 6.500 - EUR 8.500 bruto per maand, winstuitkering, een vaste onkostenvergoeding en een thuiswerkvergoeding.
  • 30 vakantiedagen (op fulltime basis) en de mogelijkheid om meer dagen te kopen of je vakantiedagen te verkopen.
  • Een leaseauto+NS business kaart of de mobiliteitsvergoeding
  • Een flexibel pensioen zonder verplichte eigen bijdrage.
  • Een uitgebreid aanbod van trainingen en opleidingen die bijdragen aan jouw professionele en persoonlijke ontwikkeling.
  • Aandacht voor vitaliteit! Sporten op het kantoor in Amstelveen of korting op een sportschool bij jou in de buurt én toegang tot coaching, gezondheids- en vitaliteitprogramma’s
  • Together’ is één van onze kernwaarden. Je kunt dus rekenen op verschillende sociale activiteiten zoals teamuitjes, borrels en evenementen samen met je collega’s

descriptionHtml:
Iets moois van A naar B brengen, daar draait álles om bij DHL eCommerce Nederland. En als Regional Supervisor Support draag jij daar direct aan bij. Zo zorg je voor een optimale aansturing van medewerkers en processen. Dus kies je voor knalgeel met een vleugje rood? Dan maak jij binnenkort het verschil voor duizenden verzenders en ontvangers over de hele wereld.


Dit ga je doen

Als Regional Supervisor Support houd jij het overzicht over jouw team en de werkzaamheden van de Support afdeling. Deze afdeling ondersteunt het operationele proces in al haar facetten. Jij zorgt ervoor dat de processen binnen jouw team ook zo goed en snel mogelijk verlopen. Jullie werkzaamheden zijn zeer divers. Denk daarbij o.a. aan werk gericht op facility (onderhoud aan gebouw en terrein), onderhoud aan voertuigen en de sorteerinstallatie, veiligheid, ISO, milieu, BHV, security gesprekken en het uitvoeren van audits). Daarbij vind jij het belangrijk dat jouw teamleden goed op hun plek zitten. Jij begeleidt hen, zodat ze zowel individueel als met het team kunnen groeien.


Verder zorg jij ervoor dat:

  • Jij contact onderhoudt met interne en externe partijen;
  • De juiste prioriteiten gesteld worden t.b.v. de werkzaamheden;
  • Bij escalaties jij de rust bewaart en weet welke partijen je moet aanhaken;
  • Jij regelmatig gesprekken voert met jouw teamleden;
  • De collega’s weten dat ze altijd bij jou en jouw team terecht kunnen;
  • In de regio voer jij taken uit op de 10 CityHubs en ondersteun je de CityHub Houders.


Werktijden en locatie

Dag diensten kunnen varieeren tussen 08:00 en 18:00 uur en sporadisch kan het nodig zijn dat er in de avonden en weekenden gewerkt moet worden. Standplaats Eindhoven.


Waar kom je te werken

DHL eCommerce, een van de divisies van DHL, is wereldleider en het meest toonaangevende logistiekbedrijf ter wereld. Dat klinkt misschien opschepperig, maar zo bedoelen we het niet: we zien het namelijk niet als een verdienste, maar als een verantwoordelijkheid. Dankzij onze positie kunnen we het verschil maken voor onze mensen, het milieu en de maatschappij. En dat blijkt: we zijn een Great Place to Work, Top Employer 2025 en helpen via DHL Cares ontzettend veel mensen die dat hard kunnen gebruiken – daar zijn we trots op!


Jouw nieuwe werkplek

Vanuit Eindhoven zijn wij gevestigd op de Achtseweg Noord 20. Hier werken wij met onze Region Manager Paul , 1 manager cityhubs, 10 supervisors, 17 teamleaders en zo’n 300 andere collega’s. Met elkaar zijn wij verantwoordelijk voor het proces van de pakketjes die uiteindelijk bij jou en mij thuisbezorgd worden.

Samen dragen wij de zorg voor alle transporten, daarom sta jij als persoon centraal en word je gezien als persoon en niet als nummer. We denken mee, alles is bespreekbaar en dit alles zorgt bij ons voor een goede en gezellige werksfeer.


Dit ben jij

Jij bent die stabiele leidinggevende die de rust kan bewaren in drukke, hectische momenten. Doordat jij de juiste prioriteiten stelt en overzicht houdt, weet jij het beste uit elke situatie te halen . Doordat jij een servicegerichte en hands-on gerichte leidinggevende bent, lever jij (met jouw team) een optimale ondersteuning aan de operatie. Jij bent benaderbaar voor jouw team en de collega’s, zodat men weet dat ze bij je terecht kunnen. Daarnaast ben jij in staat om op verschillende levels te schakelen, kan jij mensen aanspreken en in beweging krijgen wanneer dit nodig is en voel je je betrokken bij het terrein en het pand.


Verder heb je het volgende op zak:

  • Hbo werk- en denkniveau (Hbo opleiding richting Facility of logistiek is een pré)
  • Werkervaring in een leidinggevende functie (bij voorkeur in een vergelijkbare omgeving);
  • Sterke communicatieve vaardigheden zowel in het Nederlands als het Engels;
  • Affiniteit met Safety & Facility onderwerpen.


Dit krijg jij

  • Tussen € 3805,00 en € 5430,00 bruto o.b.v. 40 uur, gebaseerd op jouw kennis en ervaring;
  • 23 vakantiedagen per jaar o.b.v. 40 uur;
  • 8% vakantiegeld van jouw bruto jaarsalaris;
  • Vrijekeuzebudget: dit kun je bijvoorbeeld gebruiken voor extra salaris of meer vakantiedagen;
  • Reiskostenvergoeding van €0,23 per kilometer tot 30 kilometer per enkele reis;
  • Laptop en smartphone;
  • Een gecertificeerd inwerktraject;
  • Opleidings- en trainingsmogelijkheden;
  • Mooie doorgroeikansen: binnen je eigen afdeling of ergens anders in de organisatie.


Solliciteer direct

Sta je te springen om aan de slag te gaan? Solliciteer dan direct met jouw cv en eventueel een motivatiebrief. De sollicitatieprocedure bestaat verder uit een kennismaking via Teams en 2 gesprekken op locatie eventueel in combinatie met een meekijkdag.


Een VOG-screening en toetsing aan sanctielijsten en het interne en externe waarschuwingsregister (WLS) maken (mogelijk) deel uit van de sollicitatieprocedure.
descriptionText: Iets moois van A naar B brengen, daar draait álles om bij DHL eCommerce Nederland. En als Regional Supervisor Support draag jij daar direct aan bij. Zo zorg je voor een optimale aansturing van medewerkers en processen. Dus kies je voor knalgeel met een vleugje rood? Dan maak jij binnenkort het verschil voor duizenden verzenders en ontvangers over de hele wereld.Dit ga je doenAls Regional Supervisor Support houd jij het overzicht over jouw team en de werkzaamheden van de Support afdeling. Deze afdeling ondersteunt het operationele proces in al haar facetten. Jij zorgt ervoor dat de processen binnen jouw team ook zo goed en snel mogelijk verlopen. Jullie werkzaamheden zijn zeer divers. Denk daarbij o.a. aan werk gericht op facility (onderhoud aan gebouw en terrein), onderhoud aan voertuigen en de sorteerinstallatie, veiligheid, ISO, milieu, BHV, security gesprekken en het uitvoeren van audits). Daarbij vind jij het belangrijk dat jouw teamleden goed op hun plek zitten. Jij begeleidt hen, zodat ze zowel individueel als met het team kunnen groeien.Verder zorg jij ervoor dat:Jij contact onderhoudt met interne en externe partijen;De juiste prioriteiten gesteld worden t.b.v. de werkzaamheden;Bij escalaties jij de rust bewaart en weet welke partijen je moet aanhaken;Jij regelmatig gesprekken voert met jouw teamleden;De collega’s weten dat ze altijd bij jou en jouw team terecht kunnen;In de regio voer jij taken uit op de 10 CityHubs en ondersteun je de CityHub Houders.Werktijden en locatieDag diensten kunnen varieeren tussen 08:00 en 18:00 uur en sporadisch kan het nodig zijn dat er in de avonden en weekenden gewerkt moet worden. Standplaats Eindhoven.Waar kom je te werkenDHL eCommerce, een van de divisies van DHL, is wereldleider en het meest toonaangevende logistiekbedrijf ter wereld. Dat klinkt misschien opschepperig, maar zo bedoelen we het niet: we zien het namelijk niet als een verdienste, maar als een verantwoordelijkheid. Dankzij onze positie kunnen we het verschil maken voor onze mensen, het milieu en de maatschappij. En dat blijkt: we zijn een Great Place to Work, Top Employer 2025 en helpen via DHL Cares ontzettend veel mensen die dat hard kunnen gebruiken – daar zijn we trots op!Jouw nieuwe werkplekVanuit Eindhoven zijn wij gevestigd op de Achtseweg Noord 20. Hier werken wij met onze Region Manager Paul , 1 manager cityhubs, 10 supervisors, 17 teamleaders en zo’n 300 andere collega’s. Met elkaar zijn wij verantwoordelijk voor het proces van de pakketjes die uiteindelijk bij jou en mij thuisbezorgd worden.Samen dragen wij de zorg voor alle transporten, daarom sta jij als persoon centraal en word je gezien als persoon en niet als nummer. We denken mee, alles is bespreekbaar en dit alles zorgt bij ons voor een goede en gezellige werksfeer.Dit ben jijJij bent die stabiele leidinggevende die de rust kan bewaren in drukke, hectische momenten. Doordat jij de juiste prioriteiten stelt en overzicht houdt, weet jij het beste uit elke situatie te halen . Doordat jij een servicegerichte en hands-on gerichte leidinggevende bent, lever jij (met jouw team) een optimale ondersteuning aan de operatie. Jij bent benaderbaar voor jouw team en de collega’s, zodat men weet dat ze bij je terecht kunnen. Daarnaast ben jij in staat om op verschillende levels te schakelen, kan jij mensen aanspreken en in beweging krijgen wanneer dit nodig is en voel je je betrokken bij het terrein en het pand.Verder heb je het volgende op zak:Hbo werk- en denkniveau (Hbo opleiding richting Facility of logistiek is een pré)Werkervaring in een leidinggevende functie (bij voorkeur in een vergelijkbare omgeving);Sterke communicatieve vaardigheden zowel in het Nederlands als het Engels;Affiniteit met Safety & Facility onderwerpen.Dit krijg jijTussen € 3805,00 en € 5430,00 bruto o.b.v. 40 uur, gebaseerd op jouw kennis en ervaring;23 vakantiedagen per jaar o.b.v. 40 uur;8% vakantiegeld van jouw bruto jaarsalaris;Vrijekeuzebudget: dit kun je bijvoorbeeld gebruiken voor extra salaris of meer vakantiedagen;Reiskostenvergoeding van €0,23 per kilometer tot 30 kilometer per enkele reis;Laptop en smartphone;Een gecertificeerd inwerktraject;Opleidings- en trainingsmogelijkheden;Mooie doorgroeikansen: binnen je eigen afdeling of ergens anders in de organisatie.Solliciteer directSta je te springen om aan de slag te gaan? companyDescription:
Pitt werkt voor Microsoft partners en voor bedrijven die tijdelijk behoefte hebben aan kennis en daadkracht op het gebied van .NET, SharePoint, Dynamics CRM, BizTalk, Microsoft SQL, Silverlight, HTML5 en Office365.
 
Vinden, binden en motiveren

Onze kracht schuilt in het vinden, binden en motiveren van ervaren specialisten. Wij zorgen ervoor dat hun kennis en expertise voortdurend scherp blijft. Upgraden of (her)implementeren van Microsoft producten, uitvoeren van service- of onderhoudswerkzaamheden, maar ook het geven van advies behoort tot de kerncompetenties van de gemiddelde Pitt-specialist.

Altijd onafhankelijk

Wij richten ons puur en alleen op de dienstverlening rondom Microsoft-producten. Voor aanschaf van licenties verwijzen wij u graag naar de meest geschikte Microsoft partner. Daardoor behouden we een onafhankelijke positie, zowel ten opzichte van opdrachtgevers, als ten opzichte van het Microsoftkanaal.

descriptionHtml:
Security Administrator


Locatie: Regio Eindhoven – 2 dagen thuis/ 3 dagen kantoor

Dienstverband: Fulltime


Pitt IT zoekt voor een snelgroeiende internationale organisatie een Security Administrator die een sleutelrol speelt in het beveiligen van een moderne Microsoft-cloudomgeving en de achterliggende IT-infrastructuur. Je combineert dagelijks hands-on beheer en incidentafhandeling met het doorvoeren van verbeteringen en projecten.


In deze functie ben je de spil in het beheren van toegangsrechten, identiteiten en gevoelige data. Je werkt met uiteenlopende securitytools, begeleidt audits en compliance-trajecten en geeft advies over nieuwe bedreigingen en best practices. Je werkt nauw samen met IT Operations, een security engineer, een externe SOC-partner en de functionaris die verantwoordelijk is voor informatieveiligheid.


Jouw verantwoordelijkheden

  • Toegang & identiteiten: Beheren van RBAC, MFA, Conditional Access en guest access in Microsoft Entra ID;
  • Databeveiliging: Implementeren en beheren van DLP, AIP, Identity Protection en labelbeleid in Microsoft 365;
  • Monitoring & incidentrespons: Opvolgen van alerts, onderzoeken van meldingen (Defender, phishing, verdachte logins) en bijdragen aan patchmanagement;
  • Beveiligingstools: Configureren en optimaliseren van Microsoft Defender-producten en relevante third-party tools;
  • Compliance: Ondersteunen bij audits en rapportages (o.a. ISO27001, NIS2, AVG);
  • Security awareness: Meewerken aan phishingtests, trainingen en verbeterprojecten.


Wat maakt deze rol interessant

  • Werken in een organisatie die snel groeit en meerdere Europese markten bedient;
  • Onderdeel zijn van een cloudtransitie met veel ruimte voor optimalisatie;
  • Korte communicatielijnen, informele cultuur en ruimte voor eigen initiatief;
  • Mogelijkheid om de inrichting van securityprocessen zelf vorm te geven.


Jouw profiel

  • Minimaal 2 jaar ervaring als Security Administrator óf als (cloud) system administrator met securitytraining;
  • Ervaring met Microsoft 365-beheer en cloud security;
  • Bekend met identity management en databeveiliging;
  • Analytisch, resultaatgericht en in staat verbeteringen door te voeren;
  • Woonachtig op max. 30 km van Eindhoven, bereid incidenteel naar buitenlandse locaties te reizen.


Pré’s

  • Certificaten zoals AZ-500, SC-200, SC-300;
  • Ervaring met cloud scanning, Sentinel/KQL, of security awareness-projecten;
  • Ervaring met proces- en systeemveranderingen in een complexe omgeving.


Voorwaarden

  • Salaris nader af te stemmen;
  • 28 vakantiedagen, thuiswerkvergoeding en pensioen;
  • Laptop, fietsplan en moderne werkplek in regio Eindhoven;
  • Hybride werken (2 dagen thuis, 3 dagen kantoor);
  • Dynamische werksfeer met ruimte voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling en sociale activiteiten.


Wie zijn wij?

Pitt-IT werkt al jarenlang als werving- en selectie- en detacheringsbureau voor een breed scala aan opdrachtgevers en kandidaten. Wij weten als geen ander wat er komt kijken bij het vervullen van een vacature. Dat gaat namelijk verder dan opleiding en werkervaring. Met aandacht voor skills, communicatieve vaardigheden, persoonlijkheid, ambities en instelling naar zowel onze kandidaten als opdrachtgevers, zorgt Pitt-IT iedere keer weer voor de ultieme match!


Klaar om écht impact te maken?

Ben je enthousiast over deze nieuwe uitdaging? Dan maken we graag kennis met jou!


Heb je nog vragen?

Neem dan gerust even contact op met Pieter Doesburg via 06 58816220, of stuur hem direct jouw CV via p.doesburg@pitt-it.nl

companyDescription:
Base is a niche consultancy & managed security solutions provider, offering services enabling organizations, and professionals, to build knowledge & capabilities in information security. 

Looking for a value-add managed detection & response service ? Check out https://basecyber.com

Let’s make the world a better place together! We’ve been supporting & empowering the global security community throughout the years to navigate, thrive & solve problems in the complex world of information security. Ready to take part in that?

We utilize our collective security knowledge, expertise & resources to support organizations think about, and act on information security & privacy! From tackling security challenges & managing risk, to building & growing their security practice & teams, adding security capabilities! To protecting their business with managed detection & response, to security training & development, adopting a security by design approach, do quality security assessments & testing, and using their security efforts as a USP for their products & success.

We do the same for security professionals. As individuals or teams. Support them to identify their strengths, needs, figure out best learning & career paths, design & deliver customized security trainings. Help understand what’s out there in terms of roles, projects or other initiatives they can grow from. And, work together to help get there.

-Need guidance on how to further grow your career?A next step in a role, project or a way to learn by contributing to an initiative? 
-Have a security project you need help with?
-Need a security assessment, testing or help with your journey towards a standard,e.g.ISO 27001, NIS2? 
-Want to protect your business, with a managed detection & response service?

Reach out & let’s get a conversation going!

Follow us & stay up to date with security initiatives,community activities,our monthly security meetup,projects or roles,security knowledge sharing & more!

descriptionHtml:
Voor een organisatie actief in de vitale infrastructuur zijn we op zoek naar een ervaren Security Operations Center (SOC) professional. Je komt terecht in een dynamisch team dat verantwoordelijk is voor het waarborgen van de digitale veiligheid van de organisatie. In deze rol werk je aan het opsporen, analyseren en oplossen van beveiligingsincidenten. Je draagt actief bij aan het verbeteren van processen, tooling en detectiemogelijkheden. De functie vereist zowel technische expertise als goede communicatieve vaardigheden, omdat je veel zult samenwerken met andere teams binnen de organisatie.

Je werkt deels op locatie (vaste dag in de week) en deels vanuit huis, met een mogelijkheid om af en toe andere locaties in het land te bezoeken.

Eisen

  • Afgeronde opleiding op minimaal hbo-niveau in de richting van IT, cybersecurity of een vergelijkbaar vakgebied.
  • Minimaal één jaar aantoonbare ervaring binnen een SOC-omgeving.
  • Ervaring met triage, incident response en het uitvoeren van analyses op basis van logdata.
  • Bekendheid met security tooling, waaronder SIEM-systemen.
  • Affiniteit met cloudbeveiliging en bij voorkeur ervaring met Microsoft-gebaseerde oplossingen.
  • Bereidheid om deel te nemen aan standby-diensten en om op meerdere locaties te werken.

Competenties

  • Sterke probleemoplossende vaardigheden en het vermogen om snel te schakelen bij incidenten.
  • Teamgericht met een proactieve houding richting kennisdeling en samenwerking.
  • Gestructureerd en nauwkeurig in het documenteren van incidenten en response-acties.
  • In staat om zelfstandig verbeteringen in processen, technologie of samenwerking te signaleren en uit te voeren.
  • Gericht op continue ontwikkeling en het volgen van trends en dreigingen op het gebied van cybersecurity.

Wensen

  • Ervaring met detection engineering of threat hunting.
  • Ervaring met het opstellen en onderhouden van playbooks en responseprocedures.
  • Kennis van dreigingsinformatie en het toepassen hiervan in operationele beveiligingsprocessen.
  • Technische begeleiding kunnen bieden aan minder ervaren collega’s.
  • Ervaring met samenwerking tussen IT- en OT-security is een pluspunt.

Dit is een doorlopende vacature — we beoordelen sollicitaties continu voor deze en vergelijkbare functies.

Relevante Termen

SOC Analyst, SIEM, incident response, cyberdreigingen, threat intelligence, detection engineering, triage, informatiebeveiliging, Microsoft security tooling, cloudbeveiliging, root cause analysis, playbooks, dreigingsanalyse, security monitoring, containment, mitigatie, security operations, proactieve detectie, OT security, security incidenten, loganalyse, cybersecurity trends.

Base Cyber Security helpt organisaties bij het opbouwen van kennis en capaciteiten op het gebied van informatiebeveiliging. Het ondersteunen van organisaties bij het samenstellen van sterke infosec-teams of het vinden van de juiste cybersecurity-experts voor de behoeften van de organisatie is een essentieel aspect hiervan.

We werken samen met security professionals op wereldwijd niveau voor informatie- en cybersecurityposities en projecten in heel Europa. Of je nu aan het begin van je carrière in informatiebeveiliging staat, advies nodig hebt voor de volgende stappen in jouw loopbaan, of wilt weten hoe je jezelf het beste kunt blijven ontwikkelen en de juiste beslissingen kunt nemen, we staan klaar om te helpen en komen graag met jou in contact!

Als je nog niet bent geregistreerd, zorg er dan voor dat je dat nu doet! Stuur ons jouw gegevens via de button "Solliciteer nu" op deze pagina. en volg ons op X/Twitter@BaseCyberSec om op de hoogte te blijven van onze activiteiten en relevante informatie. Door jezelf te registreren bij onze securitygemeenschap en interesse te tonen in een specifieke rol, project of team, geef je ons expliciete toestemming om jouw gegevens te gebruiken, die Base Cyber Security verzamelt en verwerkt op een ethische en discrete manier, en indien nodig in overeenstemming met de Algemene Verordening Gegevensbescherming (AVG).

companyDescription: OLIJO is een team van vrijbuiters. Wij gaan de samenwerking aan als een volwaardige business partner en maken hierbij de juiste match! OLIJO neemt op kwalitatieve wijze werk uit handen en verbindt klanten met professionals. Op de weg naar succes zetten wij net dat stapje extra. We doen dit op onze eigen manier: professioneel, hartelijk en met een positieve instelling. Onze klanten kunnen rekenen op kwaliteit en hierbij verliezen we de wensen van de professional niet uit het oog. OLIJO kijkt niet alleen naar inhoudelijke kwaliteiten maar ook naar persoonlijke wensen en ambities. Want een persoonlijk tintje zorgt voor een sterke basis.
companySlogan: OLIJO supports organizations and professionals to connect and jointly make the next steps on their journey.
descriptionHtml:
Our Partner at a Glance

We're proud to partner with a multinational leader in the natural foods industry, a company with a legacy of more than 135 years and a reputation for excellence worldwide.

With 4000+ employees across 5 continents, they combine global reach with a uniquely close-knit and familiar atmosphere. Their mission? Delivering healthy, high-quality, and accessible food products while driving continuous innovation.


To join their history, we're looking for a Security and Compliance Lead to join them. Could it be you? 🔒


Culture That Empowers

Openness, informality, and trust are at the heart of their culture. Forget rigid hierarchies. Here, autonomy is encouraged, initiative is rewarded, and careers are shaped by those bold enough to take ownership. With short decision-making lines and a supportive environment, employees enjoy the freedom to pursue their goals and the backing to succeed.


The Role: Security and Compliance Lead

You'll be the driving force behind strengthening the organization's security framework. From designing policies aligned with NIS2 standards to proactively safeguarding systems, networks, and data... you'll play a key role in protecting a global leader.


Your key contributions will include:

  • Designing, implementing, and maintaining security policies, procedures, and guidelines.
  • Conducting regular vulnerability and risk assessments to identify and address potential threats.
  • Leading security awareness training to foster a strong security-first culture.
  • Designing and executing effective incident response plans.
  • Ensuring compliance with regulations and standards including NIS2, GDPR, and ISO 27001.
  • Preparing detailed reports on the company’s security posture and improvements.
  • Collaborating with teams across the organization to embed security into every process.


What You Bring

  • Bachelor’s in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent experience.
  • Professional certifications (CISSP, CISM, CEH, etc.) — highly valued.
  • 3+ years of experience managing and implementing security policies, ideally in a leadership role.
  • Strong background in vulnerability management.
  • Fluency in Dutch (mandatory) and English.
  • Analytical, decisive, and solution-oriented mindset.
  • Strong interpersonal skills to work both independently and collaboratively.
  • Experience ensuring compliance within complex, global organizations.
  • Proven track record of leading security projects in multi-company environments.


Why You'll Love It Here

As a Security and Compliance Lead, you won't just join a dynamic, innovative, global team. You'll take on a leading role with real impact. On top of that, you'll enjoy a competitive and rewarding package, including:

  • A salary adjusted to your experience, average €5000 gross per month as a reference
  • 8% holiday allowance
  • 13th month salary
  • Bonus structure
  • Generous time off to recharge
  • Flexible remote working options
  • Opportunities to grow through continuous professional development
  • A supportive, inclusive, people-first environment where your contributions truly matter


📩 Curious? Let's talk!

Send your profile to ana@olijo.nl

S-RM is a global intelligence and cyber security consultancy. Founded in 2005, we have 400+ practitioners spanning nine international offices, serving clients across all regions and major sectors. 

We support our clients by providing intelligence that informs critical decision-making and strategies, from investments and partnerships through to disputes; by helping organisations build resilience to cyber security threats; and by responding to cyber-attacks and organisational crises. 

Client focus is at the heart of what we do. Our advice is direct, honest and objective. We deliver actionable results for our clients by bringing together the best talent and creating teams designed to address unique problems and complex challenges.

For more information: www.s-rminform.com
companySlogan: Your First Call for Investigations and Cyber Security.
descriptionHtml:
WHO WE ARE

S-RM is a global intelligence and cyber security consultancy. Since 2005, we've helped some of the most demanding clients in the world solve some of their toughest information security challenges.

We've been able to do this because of our outstanding people. We're committed to developing bright, curious, driven individuals who want to think critically, solve complex problems, and achieve success.

But we also know that work isn't everything. It's about the lives and careers it helps us build. We're immensely proud of this culture and we invest in our people's wellbeing, learning, and ideas every day.

We're excited you're thinking about joining us.

WORKING IN CYBER AT S-RM

Our Cyber Security division is the newest and fastest-growing part of S-RM. The cyber sector is always evolving, and our Advisory, Testing, and Incident Response practices are in more demand than ever. Our cyber team based in the Netherlands is the newest addition within Cyber, delivering all of our services to clients in the Netherlands, the Benelux, even the entire European region.

We're building a team to meet this challenge. This means we're quick to respond, innovate, and improve. We don't get too hung up on hierarchy or bureaucracy. If your ideas are good enough, we'll empower you to implement them. If you're the best person to talk to a customer, you'll get that opportunity, regardless of the title in your email signature. And when you need a hand, your team will always have your back.

We also don't believe there's a typical cyber security professional. We've built a team of intelligence analysts, technical specialists, software developers, investigators, risk managers, and more. You'll always find a range of perspectives and expertise to help you learn and grow.

If that sounds like your kind of team, we'd like to hear from you.

THE ROLE

As a Commercial Cyber Incident Response Lead your role consists out of two complementary aspects: a commercial focus to grow out BeNeLux Incident Response offering and the role of Cyber Incident Response lead, specifically for cases that require Dutch language and have come in through the BeNeLux office. As such this require requires fluency in Dutch.

As a Commercial Cyber Incident Response Lead, you will foster and grow existing relationships within the Incident Response ecosystem, as well as build new relationships and partnerships within the Incident Response ecosystem. Focus is on insurance and legal partnerships within the Netherlands, Belgium and Luxemburg.

As a Cyber Incident Response Lead, you will work across the full lifecycle of security incidents to help our clients respond and recover, including:

  • Collecting technical evidence from client environments.
  • Ingesting evidence into analysis platforms such as forensic analysis tools or log analysis platforms.
  • Investigating cyber incidents to determine whether the confidentiality, integrity or availability of the information has been affected.
  • Gathering intelligence on threat actors to inform decision-making in high pressure situations.
  • Advising clients on containment actions designed to limit the effects of cyber incidents.
  • Deploying technologies such as endpoint detection and response solutions or tactical SIEM.
  • Assisting the recovery of clients' IT infrastructure during and after cyber attacks.
  • Communicating technical language into key takeaways for executives.

Other features of the role include:

Variety of casework: no day will be the same. Our team responds to a huge variety of incidents for both public and corporate clients.

Range of opportunities: you will have opportunities to broaden your security awareness into testing and advisory projects, in addition to deepening your incident response expertise.

Flexible working practices: responding to incidents can be intense, high-pressure work. We are mindful of our team's work/life balance and offer flexible working options to support your wellbeing.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We think candidates with the following qualifications and experience are likely to succeed as Cyber Incident Responders at S-RM.

That said, if you don't think you meet all of the criteria below but still are interested in the job, please apply. Nobody checks every box—we're looking for candidates that are particularly strong in a few areas and have some interest and capabilities in others.

We nurture a culture of equality, diversity and inclusion and we are dedicated to developing a workforce that displays a variety of talents, experiences and perspectives.

We're looking for:

  • Tertiary education (HBO/WO) or relevant industry experience
  • Ideally some experience in responding to a variety of cyber incidents
  • Ideally some commercial experience within the IR ecosystem including with legal and insurers
  • Any experience presenting verbal updates or written reports to internal/external stakeholders with non-technical backgrounds would be highly beneficial. It would also be a benefit if you have prior consulting experience, though it is not a requirement

Demonstrable knowledge in some of the following areas:

  • Endpoint Forensic Analysis
  • Malware Analysis
  • Network Forensics
  • Cloud Forensics
  • Mobile Device Analysis
  • Evidence Handling and Preservation
  • Industrial Control Systems and Operational Technology
  • Common enterprise security technologies (endpoint protection, SIEM, IDS/IPS, EDR, DLP)
  • Windows system administration and associated concepts
  • Identity management including Active Directory
  • Managing routers, gateways and switches
  • Virtualisation technologies (ESXI, VMWare etc.)
  • Linux administration
  • Email infrastructure (Office 365, on-premise Exchange)
  • Remote access infrastructure

Relevant industry certifications are not required for this role. However, holding any of the following is beneficial: GCFE, GCFA, EnCE, CFSR, CISSP, GREM, CCNA, MCFE, OSCP, Network+ and Security+

The successful candidate must have permission to work in the Netherlands by the start of their employment.

OUR BENEFITS

We offer thoughtful, balanced rewards and support to help our people do their best work and live their lives outside it, including:

  • Maternity and paternity benefits including:
    • Maternity leave: 26 weeks full pay followed by 13 weeks half pay
    • Paternity leave: 6 weeks of full pay
  • 25 holiday days per year, which increases with service to a maximum of 30 days + public holidays
  • 6% matching pension contribution
  • Several options around mobility such as an OV-card or a lease car
  • 4 x annual salary life insurance
  • EAP for your mental wellbeing, including counselling sessions available to you and your family
  • Free access to the world-famous mindfulness app Headspace
  • Flexible working hours
  • Extensive training available, including through LinkedIn Learning with access to more than 13,000 different courses

descriptionHtml:
Job Role: IT Security and Compliance Director


Location: Rotterdam, The Netherlands


Work Pattern: Hybrid Working


Gross Salary: Up to €125,000 + Bonus + Benefits


Summary

A new position has opened up for an experienced Security & Compliance Director to lead a global cybersecurity and compliance program across APAC, EMEA, and the Americas. This is a senior leadership role where you’ll set the vision, drive security-by-design practices, and build a culture of trust and resilience across digital products and services.


The role is being offered as hybrid working from the client’s Rotterdam office..


The Role

As the Security and Compliance Director you will be leading the global cybersecurity program for a fast-growing solutions company. It will be a mission-critical role within the business where you will be responsible managing certifications, guiding a multi-disciplinary team of security professionals, and setting roadmaps. Excellent leadership, communication and strategy skills are required.


Your duties will include:


  • Define and execute global security and compliance strategies
  • Shape secure development and DevSecOps practices
  • Safeguard multi-cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure)
  • Lead incident response and security operations
  • Oversee certifications (ISO 27001, SOC 2) and regulatory compliance
  • Engage directly with clients, auditors and stakeholders
  • Inspire and mentor a global team of security professionals


Requirements

  • Previous leadership experience within Cyber and IT Security
  • Proven success in achieving compliance certifications
  • CISSP, CISM, CISA, ISO 27001, cloud security credentials


Benefits

  • Bonus Scheme
  • Fully Covered Pension Scheme
  • 25 days holiday + bank holidays
  • Travel Allowance


Next Steps:

If you are an experienced CyberSecurity specialist eager to spearhead sales at an impressive global business, and looking to progress with an organisation that has a fantastic approach to work in a supportive and driven environment, then look no further - this is the role for you!


Interviews for this role will be held imminently. To be considered, please send your CV to me now to avoid disappointment.


Please Note: This Role Is Unable To Provide Sponsorship


Referrals:

If this role isn’t right for you, do you know someone that might be interested?

**** You could earn £500 of retail vouchers if you refer a successful candidate to Oscar ****

Email Rebecca.myers@oscar-tech.com to recommend someone.

descriptionHtml:
Join us as an AIOps DevOps Engineer and help optimize operational efficiency by leveraging AI-driven solutions, automation, and ZeroOps principles. You’ll work on exciting projects to streamline processes, enhance system performance, and implement self-healing capabilities. By utilizing cutting-edge AIOps technologies, you’ll drive the future of ZeroOps, eliminating manual interventions and ensuring seamless, reliable operations. 


Why Join Us? 


At Wypoon Technologies, you’ll work on dynamic projects for industry leaders such as Heineken, ING, ASML, Philips, and Shell, tackling exciting challenges and delivering tailored enterprise solutions. 


Here’s what makes us stand out: 

✔ Impactful Work: Shape the future of our clients’ digital landscapes. 

✔ Innovative Environment: Collaborate within a supportive team that values learning and growth. 

✔ State-of-the-art technology: Access the latest tools and platforms. 

✔ Global Opportunities: Dreaming of living and working in the Netherlands or Belgium? We provide full support with visa processes, making your transition smooth and hassle-free! 

  


Key Responsibilities
  • Design and implement AIOps solutions to improve system observability and automated issue resolution. 
  • Optimize operational workflows by automating repetitive tasks and eliminating manual interventions. 
  • Work with monitoring tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, Splunk) and AI-driven platforms to analyze and predict system behavior. 
  • Develop auto-remediation frameworks to resolve incidents automatically and proactively. 
  • Integrate CI/CD pipelines to ensure seamless deployment and scalability. 
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure system reliability and performance. 


Requirements
  • A minimum of 5 years in DevOps or Cloud Engineering.
  • Advanced proficiency in the English Language (at least B2 in speaking, writing, listening, and reading). 
  • A minimum of a bachelor's degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 
  • Strong knowledge of monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, CloudWatch, Azure Monitor). 
  • Proven experience with AIOps tools (e.g., Moogsoft, Dynatrace, Datadog). 
  • Experience with auto-remediation frameworks and incident response automation. 
  • Strong knowledge of CI/CD principles, Azure Cloud, and Azure DevOps. 
  • Experience with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes), with a preference for hands-on experience with Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). 
  • Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation). 
  • Familiarity with scripting languages (Python, Bash, PowerShell) for automation. 
  • Strong communication skills and experience in Agile environments. 


What We Offer
  • Competitive Compensation: Salary tailored to your skills and experience. 
  • Generous Time Off: 25 paid vacation days (based on a 40-hour work week). 
  • Job Security: A direct and permanent contract from day one! 
  • Relocation Support: A relocation and travel budget to ease your transition. 
  • Tax Benefits: Eligibility for the 30% ruling. 
  • Travel Reimbursement: We've got your daily commute covered. 
  • Top-Notch Equipment: A high-quality device to ensure you work efficiently. 
  • Professional Development: Financial support for certifications, technical training, and language courses—because we value your long-term career growth. 
  • Family: Visa sponsorship for your partner and children under 18. 
  • Temporary Accommodation: Stay in temporary housing while we help you find your permanent home. 
  • Comprehensive Relocation Assistance: Extensive support to help you settle in smoothly. 
  • Community & Fun: Enjoy team events and connect with developers from around the globe! 



Join Wypoon Technologies, where your expertise will thrive, your ideas will be valued, and your career will reach new heights. 

Apply now to be part of our transformative journey!

companyDescription:
Who are we?

ASML is an innovation leader in the global semiconductor industry. We make machines that chipmakers use to mass produce microchips. Founded in 1984 in the Netherlands with just a handful of employees, we’ve now grown to over 40,000 employees, 143 nationalities and more than 60 locations around the world.

What do we do?

We provide chipmakers with hardware, software and services to mass produce patterns on silicon through lithography. Our lithography systems use ultraviolet light to create billions of tiny structures on silicon that together make up a microchip. We push our technology to new limits to enable our customers to create smaller, faster and more powerful chips.

Who are our people?

While you may think that only engineers and mathematicians work at ASML, you'll be surprised to find out that our people come from a wide variety of backgrounds. Across ASML, we have dedicated teams that manage customer support, communications and media, IT, software development and more. Every team in the company is essential for pushing our technology and the industry forward.

If you love to tackle challenges and innovate in a collaborative, supportive and inclusive environment with all the flexibility and freedom to unleash your full potential, ASML is the place to be.

Join us!
companySlogan: Changing the world, one nanometer at a time
descriptionHtml:
Introduction to the Job

As Security incident response team lead, you will take a leadership role within the Security Incident Response Team (SIRT). Your primary focus will be on leading a team of security analysts and play a key role in shaping ASML’s security posture.

Role and Responsibilities

The Security Incident Response Team (SIRT) operates within the Security Operations Center (SOC) to detect and mitigate security threats in real time. As a SIRT Team Lead, you will be responsible for people management, operational security monitoring and security improvements.

You will manage team(s) performance during daily operations and provide process and technical guidance to team members across the board. You coordinate staffing and resource allocation of team members across end-to-end SIRT operations and collaborate with Service Delivery Management for specialist track capacity management and empower end- to-end process execution.

The team of security analysts consists of diverse areas of expertise security incident response (Cyber, IT, OT, DLP, Physical), threat hunting, and driving strategic security improvements. You will play a key role in mentoring security analysts and shaping the organization’s security posture. The main focus points of the role of SIRT team lead:

  • Develop & grow your team members to support wider ranges of security incidents and become more valuable and well-rounded security analysts.
  • Identify and implement process level improvements in the team and strengthen the collaboration across ASML together with the rest of the leadership team.
  • Ensure high quality analysis, documentation and resolution on all security incidents managed in your team aligned with a common documentation way of working across the ASML Security incident management workflow.

Education and experience

This position requires deep tactical, people management expertise, with a balanced technical knowledge, strong analytical skills, and the ability to understand complex security investigations and lead security improvements. The ideal candidate will have:

  • Strong team development & coaching focus.
  • Strong stakeholder management and build solid relationships of trust at different levels.
  • 8+ years of management experience, preferably in a multinational corporate security environment.
  • Proven experience with security monitoring & incident response activities.
  • Broad experience in multiple security domains (e.g., IT, Information, Operational Technology (OT) or Physical Security.
  • Master’s degree working and thinking level.
  • CISM, CISSP, or SANS GSOC/GSOM certificate is a must.

Skills

  • Expertise in Security Monitoring, Analysis, Containment and Remediation.
  • Strong Leadership & Mentorship Capabilities.
  • Expertise leading Cultural and Agile transformation.

Other Information

Are you interested in this role? Please apply with your CV and cover letter, detailing your motivation for this position.

  • The role may involve shift work or on-call duties to provide 24/7 security coverage.
  • This position is primarily office-based, with the possibility of remote work.
  • It is preferred if you possess a valid work permit for the Netherlands.

This position requires access to controlled technology, as defined in the United States Export Administration Regulations (15 C.F.R.

  • 730, et seq.). Qualified candidates must be legally authorized to access such controlled technology prior to beginning work. Business demands may require ASML to proceed with candidates who are immediately eligible to access controlled technology.

Diversity and inclusion

ASML is an Equal Opportunity Employer that values and respects the importance of a diverse and inclusive workforce. It is the policy of the company to recruit, hire, train and promote persons in all job titles without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin, veteran status, disability, sexual orientation, or gender identity. We recognize that diversity and inclusion is a driving force in the success of our company.

Need to know more about applying for a job at ASML? Read our frequently asked questions.

companyDescription:
Datenna provides unparalleled insights into China’s techno-economic landscape by leveraging China expertise with OSINT and AI.

Decisionmakers worldwide rely on Datenna's platform for actionable intelligence on China's economic and academic landscape, including underlying connections to the Chinese government and defence sector. 

Datenna’s intelligence platform, curated by our in-house team of China experts, extensively maps out key metrics, such as shareholder structures, geolocation, key management staff, patents, military procurements, investments, government funding, and research projects.

Our insights support a wide range of use cases, including investment screening, export control, compliance and risk management, and equipping clients to navigating the complexities of the Chinese market.
companySlogan: Decoding China. Empowering decisions.
descriptionHtml:
Why you’ll love this job

Join us as a Senior IT Support Engineer, and lead the evolution of our back-office architecture and day-to-day operations. You’ll drive innovation and reliability across our core back-office systems and network environments. This role offers the opportunity to shape our back-office strategy, foster a strong IT culture, and solve complex technical challenges. Your efforts will directly impact the day-to-day operations, security, and performance of our back-office architecture, supporting critical services and systems.

The Role: As a Senior IT Support Engineer, you will oversee the design, implementation, and management of our back-office technologies, including hardware, software, networks and systems. You’ll provide both strategic direction and hands-on guidance, ensuring the reliability and efficiency of our systems. This role combines technical expertise with stakeholder management.

Your Mission

  • Fostering a culture of collaboration and continuous learning.
  • Ensure compliance with relevant regulations, standards, and best practices.
  • Oversee IT operations, ensuring high levels of performance, security, and availability.
  • Lead IT projects, including system upgrades, migrations, and integrations.
  • Evaluate and recommend new technologies and systems to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Lead incident response and on-call processes.
  • Contribute to the technical roadmap and long-term strategy development.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to understand and address their technology needs.

Experience

What makes you a great candidate:

  • 5+ years in IT roles.
  • Hands-on experience with back-office systems, including CRM, MDM, HRMS, SSE, SASE.
  • Proven work experience in high-security environments.

Technical Expertise

  • Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft technologies (e.g., AD, Office 365).
  • Proficiency in managing, observing & monitoring endpoint management platforms.
  • Solid understanding of CRM solutions.
  • Deep expertise in office networks.
  • Experience with incident management, problem resolution.
  • Knowledge of ISO27001 (access control and identity management, incident response, endpoint security, network security, application security, data protection and encryption).

Nice To Have

  • Experience with configuring SASE solutions.
  • Familiarity with network detection and response systems.
  • ITIL/COBIT/CITM/CGEIT/CISSP certification.
  • Please note that applicants may be subject to a screening process.*

Why you’ll love Datenna

  • Work on globally impactful projects in geopolitical intelligence
  • Lead innovation in OSINT and AI technologies
  • Competitive compensation and benefits
  • Dynamic, international team environment
  • Significant growth opportunities in a scale-up

When you apply to this position, we will process your personal data according to our Recruitment Privacy Notice.

companyDescription:
Futureproof Group is een solide samenwerking van ambitieuze ICT-dienstverleners met een bewezen trackrecord. Samen helpen we organisaties vooruit met toekomstbestendige oplossingen.

De groep bestaat uit Advisor ICT Solutions, Allround Computer Service, Arrix, Collabite, DesktopToWork, IT Worxx, Libra ICT, Micros, Novion, Tredion, Xantion ICT, Referit, Reliable it-services, VBVB ICT, Veldwerk, Selles, Magna Cura Automatisering, Steal IT, RIN en Andante.

Organisaties moeten focus behouden op de kern van hun dienstverlening, goed werkende ICT is daarbij een voorwaarde. Daarnaast hebben ze behoefte aan een sterke ICT-partner die dichtbij ze staat; de Trusted Advisor die kennis van zaken combineert met betrokkenheid en klant specifieke aandachtsgebieden.  

Futureproof Group biedt het beste van twee werelden. Onze merken worden elk aangedreven door succesvolle ondernemers. Ze bundelen krachten, maar behouden eigen focus. Samen blinken we uit in wendbaarheid. We bieden zowel de brede als specialistische ICT-expertise die organisaties verder helpen. 

Daarom Futureproof Group.
